mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_table (id, news_id, user_id, content, parent_id, like_count, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{newsId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{likeCount}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comment_table WHERE news_id = #{newsId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT * FROM comment_table WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE comment_table SET content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE comment_table SET like_count = like_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
